utility_evaluation.REASONING: The format requires 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all six items. Destination and travel_dates are fully specified. Transportation includes flight details and total cost. Accommodation includes hotel details and total cost. Activities include a list, guide info, difficulty level, and total cost. Additional_services include dining with costs. Total_budget includes cost breakdown, limit, remaining, and due date. All items are fully specified.
